_comment: Baseline coverage for CORE modules tracked as debt per docs/TESTING.md §12. The coverage-check script enforces actual >= baseline (zero buffer). Captured at end of a coverage-work session, per TESTING.md §3 'Baseline timing'. Baseline captured with 5 known-failing TTS tests per TESTING.md §12 'Known environmental test flakiness'. Coverage values for affected modules may be marginally under-reported; will be recaptured post-Phase-6 polluter fix.
